BRANCH.COMMENT: --- VE-1246 Check if cutOffDate is passed as input ---

SEQUENCE.COMMENT: --- VE-1246 cutOff date is not null, use cutOff date in SB API ---

INVOKE.COMMENT: get how many groups entity is part of
get how many groups entity created

SEQUENCE.NAME: $default
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: --- VE-1246 cutOff date is null, use current date in SB API ---

INVOKE.COMMENT: get how many groups entity is part of
get how many groups entity created
